description: Evolve the JIT interrupt/repair flow into a structured BugReport system with a global BugFix DB.

nodes.title: 01-bugreport-node-schema
nodes.description: Define the BugReport Node schema as a SmartList node type. Fields: bug_id, source_agent, parent_agent, error_output, stack_context, attempted_fixes, reproduction_steps, recommended_fix_plan, severity, status (open/in-repair/resolved), created_at, resolved_at. Global registry path: smartlist/bug-reports/. Implement the schema in the memoryctl codebase.

nodes.title: 02-parent-detection-and-line-pause
nodes.description: Modify run-swarm-plan.py so the orchestrator (parent) detects subagent failure via exit code or inbox signal, then pauses the execution line (keeps the node in a 'paused' state rather than killing it). Currently workers self-interrupt; this shifts detection responsibility to the parent.

nodes.title: 03-bug-report-agent
nodes.description: Create a bug-report agent (.claude/teams/bug-reporter.yml) that the parent spawns when a line is paused. The agent: (1) reads the failed node's context, error output, and swarm-plan state, (2) searches AMS memory for similar past bugs, (3) produces a structured BugReport Node with detailed diagnosis and recommended fix plan, (4) writes it to the global registry at smartlist/bug-reports/.

nodes.title: 04-orchestrator-integration
nodes.description: Wire the new flow into run-swarm-plan.py: on subagent failure -> parent pauses line -> spawns bug-reporter -> BugReport Node created -> existing repairer reads BugReport and executes the recommended fix plan -> on success, resume the paused line. Replaces the current ad-hoc interrupt policy node with the BugReport as the handoff artifact between detection and repair.

nodes.title: 05-global-registry-query
nodes.description: Make the BugReport registry queryable: add memoryctl or ams.bat commands to list open bugs, search by subsystem, and check if a similar bug was already reported/fixed. This feeds back into the repairer and bug-reporter agents so they can avoid duplicate work and learn from past fixes.

nodes.title: 06-bugfix-db-stubs
nodes.description: Stub out the BugFix global DB (smartlist/bug-fixes/). Schema: fix_id, title, tool_type (script/patch/config), applicable_bug_patterns, success_count, failure_count, cross-refs to BugReport IDs. Define the assignment interface: when a repairer is spawned, the orchestrator queries the BugFix DB for fixes matching the BugReport's pattern and injects them into the repairer's context. Architecture notes only — no FEP learning implementation. Leave hooks for future FEP integration to score and evolve fixes based on outcomes.
